feat.name: Signature Spell Expansion
feat.text: Your innate connection to magic lets you cast more spells with greater freedom. You gain two additional signature spells, each of which must have a base rank of 3rd or lower.

traits.name: Psychic
traits.text: This indicates abilities from the psychic class.

traits.name: Sorcerer
traits.text: This indicates abilities from the sorcerer class.
